thag10.1:1.1: Covered in embers now are the trees,
thag10.1:1.2: shedding their canopy, lord, in search of fruit.
thag10.1:1.3: As if flaring up, they glow.
thag10.1:1.4: The time, great hero, partakes of savors.
thag10.1:2.2: waft delights all around, in all directions,
thag10.1:2.3: dropping their petals in hope of fruit.
thag10.1:2.4: Now, O hero, is the time to set forth.
thag10.1:3.1: Neither too cold nor too hot:
thag10.1:3.2: pleasant the season, lord, fit for a journey.
thag10.1:3.3: Let them see you—the Sakyans & Koliyans—
thag10.1:3.4: facing west, crossing in the Rohiṇī.
thag10.1:4.1: In hope they plow the field.
thag10.1:4.2: In hope the seed is sown.
thag10.1:4.3: In hope do merchants go to sea,
thag10.1:4.6: Let the hope in which I stand bear fruit.
thag10.1:5.1: Again & again they sow the seed.
thag10.1:5.3: Again & again farmers plow the fields.
thag10.1:5.4: Again & again grain comes to the kingdom.
thag10.1:6.2: Again & again lords of giving give.
thag10.1:6.3: Again & again having given, the lords of giving
thag10.1:6.4: again & again go to the heavenly place. * * *
thag10.1:7.1: Truly, an enlightened one of deep discernment cleanses, back for seven generations,
thag10.1:7.2: the family in which he’s born.
thag10.1:7.3: I would imagine you to be Sakka, the deva of devas
thag10.1:7.4: for you engendered a sage truly named.
thag10.1:8.1: Suddhodana is the name of the Great Seer’s father,
thag10.1:8.2: and Māyā name of the Buddha’s mother
thag10.1:8.3: who, having nurtured the bodhisatta with her womb,
thag10.1:8.4: at the break-up of the body, rejoices in the threefold divine realm.
thag10.1:9.1: She, Gotamī, having passed away, having fallen away from here,
thag10.1:9.2: is now endowed with heavenly sensual pleasures.
thag10.1:9.3: She rejoices in the five strings of sensuality,
thag10.1:9.4: surrounded by those groups of devas.
thag10.1:10.1: I am the son of the Buddha, who endures what is hard to endure—
thag10.1:10.3: You, Sakka, are my father’s father.
thag10.1:10.4: In the Dhamma, Gotama, you are my grandfather.
